task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard, schedule screen, or search interface is visible, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the patient record for Robert Crawley.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart, demographic details, or eChart for 'Robert Crawley' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the existing cardiology consultation request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The consultations list or view screen is open, displaying an existing request for specialist 'Alice Wong' or specialty 'Cardiology'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the existing consultation for editing rather than creating a new one.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The consultation edit screen is visible and pre-populated with existing data (e.g., reason 'Atrial Fibrillation - please assess', specialist 'Alice Wong'). It should not be a blank 'Add Consultation' form.

task_completion.description: Verify the consultation status was updated to indicate completion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The consultation status for Alice Wong is displayed as 'Completed', 'Consult Received', 'Complete', 'Done', 'Received', or 'Report Received' in the consultation list or saved view.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the OSCAR EMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is used to navigate OSCAR EMR. There should be no terminal windows showing direct SQL database updates or curl commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not create a new consultation request.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the patient's consultation list, there is only one consultation for Alice Wong / Cardiology. There should not be multiple identical or similar requests.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not mock the result in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows the actual OSCAR EMR interface with its standard layout, menus, and styling, not a generic text editor or manipulated local HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Robert Crawley. Specialist: Alice Wong (Cardiology). Original Consult Reason: 'Atrial Fibrillation - please assess'. The target status is considered correct if it is any case-insensitive match of: 'completed', 'complete', 'done', 'consult received', 'received', or 'report received'. The agent MUST edit the existing consultation request and NOT create a new one.
